{{Infobox artifact
| name = Tempest Jar
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tempest Jar]] is a large ceramic jar painted to resemble a furious ocean storm.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tempest Jar]] contains [[madra]] similar to [[Tiberian Arelius]]'s.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tempest Jar]] recovered for another shot.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
